input_text: Jiran sebelah rumah ni memang tak ada otak, parking depan gate aku setiap hari
reason: Calls neighbor brainless over parking dispute. Insult-laden but about a mundane neighborhood issue.
suggested_rewrite: Jiran sebelah selalu parking depan gate saya, harap boleh berbincang elok-elok.

input_text: Anjing jiran aku menyalak tengah malam macam nak gila, owner pun satu hal tak reti jaga
reason: Complains about neighbor's dog with rude remarks about the owner. Emotionally frustrated, dismissive tone.
suggested_rewrite: Anjing jiran saya menyalak tengah malam dan mengganggu, harap pemilik boleh uruskan.

input_text: Orang KL memang macam tu la, sombong tak tentu pasal, balik kampung pun nak tunjuk
reason: Stereotyping all KL people as arrogant. Regional prejudice with dismissive tone, vague communal undertone.
suggested_rewrite: Kadang-kadang ada orang dari KL yang nampak kurang mesra bila balik kampung.

input_text: Orang Johor ni memang keras kepala, cakap sikit terus nak gaduh
reason: Negative stereotyping of Johor people as stubborn and aggressive. Regional generalization.
suggested_rewrite: Ada sesetengah orang Johor yang memang tegas dengan pendirian mereka.

input_text: Sabah Sarawak orang kampung je, datang KL macam jakun tengok bangunan tinggi
reason: Derogatory stereotyping of East Malaysians as backward villagers. Dismissive and regionally prejudiced.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Sabah Sarawak yang datang KL mungkin excited tengok suasana bandar yang berbeza.

input_text: Penang driver memang paling teruk kat Malaysia, signal pun tak reti guna
reason: Stereotyping Penang drivers as the worst. Rude generalization about a regional group.
suggested_rewrite: Ada pemandu dari Penang yang kurang berhati-hati di jalan raya.

input_text: Waiter restoran tu memang bodoh, order nasi goreng dapat nasi lemak, otak letak mana
reason: Insults restaurant waiter as stupid over a wrong order. Personal attack on service staff.
suggested_rewrite: Waiter restoran tu tersalah hantar order, minta nasi goreng tapi dapat nasi lemak.

input_text: Makcik kantin sekolah tu kedekut gila, lauk sikit je harga mahal. Rompak siang hari
reason: Insults school canteen operator as stingy and accuses of daylight robbery. Rude and emotionally charged.
suggested_rewrite: Kantin sekolah harga agak mahal berbanding porsi yang dihidangkan.

input_text: Kenduri kawin semalam makanan macam taik, pelamin cantik tapi perut lapar balik
reason: Vulgar criticism of wedding food. Rude and disrespectful about someone's wedding event.
suggested_rewrite: Kenduri kawin semalam pelamin cantik tapi makanan kurang memuaskan.

input_text: Pengantin tu overdress gila, macam nak pergi Oscar bukan kenduri kampung
reason: Mocking a bride's outfit at a wedding. Gossipy and dismissive personal commentary.
suggested_rewrite: Pengantin tu bergaya sangat, mungkin lebih dari jangkaan untuk kenduri kampung.

input_text: Team Malaysia main macam ayam, coach pun satu hal tak reti susun strategi
reason: Mocks national team performance and coach competence. Rude sports commentary but not hateful.
suggested_rewrite: Team Malaysia perlu tingkatkan prestasi, strategi coach juga perlu dikaji semula.

input_text: Pemain tu gaji berjuta tapi main macam budak bawah 12, malu je pakai jersey negara
reason: Mocks player salary vs performance. Emotionally frustrated sports commentary with personal attack.
suggested_rewrite: Pemain tu bergaji tinggi tapi prestasi kurang memuaskan, harap boleh improve.

input_text: Peminat club tu memang bengap, kalah sikit dah nak bakar stadium
reason: Insults sports fans as stupid and exaggerates their reactions. Rude generalization.
suggested_rewrite: Peminat club tu terlalu emosional, kalah sikit dah bertindak melampau.

input_text: Kau memang keyboard warrior la bro, belakang screen je berani cakap besar
reason: Calling someone a keyboard warrior. Online argument with dismissive personal attack.
suggested_rewrite: Senang cakap besar di media sosial, tapi mungkin elok berbincang secara berhemah.

input_text: Orang Kelantan datang KL memang macam tu, bawak perangai kampung masuk bandar
reason: Stereotyping Kelantanese people as uncivilized in the city. Regional prejudice with dismissive tone.
suggested_rewrite: Ada perbezaan budaya antara kawasan, tapi semua orang boleh menyesuaikan diri.

input_text: Pengurus condo ni memang lembab, report paip bocor sebulan lepas masih tak settle
reason: Calls condo management slow/incompetent. Rude but driven by genuine frustration over unresolved issue.
suggested_rewrite: Pengurus condo lambat bertindak, laporan paip bocor sudah sebulan masih belum diselesaikan.

input_text: Lelaki yang bawak motor tu memang sial, potong queue parking lepas tu buat muka selamba
reason: Uses mild profanity ('sial') about someone cutting a parking queue. Emotionally charged neighborhood frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Pemotorsikal tu tak bertimbang rasa, potong barisan parking dan buat selamba.

input_text: Wedding planner kawan aku tu memang scammer, ambil duit deposit lepas tu kerja tunggang langgang
reason: Accuses a wedding planner of being a scammer without proof. Mild rumor and rude personal attack.
suggested_rewrite: Wedding planner kawan saya kurang memuaskan, kerja tak setimpal dengan bayaran deposit.

input_text: Mak mentua aku memang mulut laser, kenduri belum habis dah kutuk sana sini
reason: Gossipy complaint about mother-in-law's behavior at a wedding. Rude personal commentary.
suggested_rewrite: Mak mentua saya suka memberi komen tentang orang lain semasa kenduri.

input_text: Jiran bawah flat aku ni memang setan, tengah malam pasang karaoke volume max
reason: Calls neighbor a devil for late-night karaoke. Rude insult driven by noise frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Jiran bawah flat saya mengganggu, sering pasang karaoke kuat tengah malam.

input_text: Cannot brain this government lah, say want to help B40 but everything also price increase
reason: Dismissive political commentary in Malaysian English. Sarcastic tone mocking government policy inconsistency.
suggested_rewrite: It's frustrating that the government promises to help B40 but prices keep increasing.

input_text: So stupid lah these politicians, talk so much but end of the day nothing happens
reason: Calls politicians stupid. Generic insult-based political frustration without specific threat.
suggested_rewrite: These politicians talk a lot but there's little follow-through on their promises.

input_text: KL people all like that one, damn arrogant, think they better than everyone else
reason: Stereotyping all KL residents as arrogant. Regional prejudice expressed dismissively.
suggested_rewrite: Some people from KL can come across as a bit proud, but it's not fair to generalize everyone.

input_text: The teacher at my kid's school is so useless, cannot even control the class properly
reason: Calls a teacher useless. Angry parent venting with rude personal attack on educator.
suggested_rewrite: The teacher at my kid's school seems to struggle with classroom management, hope it improves.

input_text: This restaurant's service damn terrible, the waiter got attitude somemore, like we owe him money
reason: Rude restaurant review with personal attack on waiter's attitude. Dismissive tone.
suggested_rewrite: This restaurant's service was disappointing, the waiter could have been more professional.

input_text: My neighbor is such an idiot, park the car block my driveway every single day
reason: Calls neighbor an idiot over parking issue. Rude personal insult from neighborhood frustration.
suggested_rewrite: My neighbor keeps parking in front of my driveway, it's really inconsiderate.

input_text: JB people driving in Singapore confirm disaster, don't know the roads then drive so slow hold up everyone
reason: Stereotyping JB drivers as bad in Singapore. Regional prejudice with dismissive tone.
suggested_rewrite: Drivers unfamiliar with Singapore roads might drive slower, which can be frustrating for others.

input_text: These keyboard warriors damn annoying lah, behind screen so brave, in real life confirm quiet like mouse
reason: Dismissive mocking of online commenters. Rude generalization about internet behavior.
suggested_rewrite: Some online commenters are very aggressive online but may not act the same way in person.

input_text: The wedding food was rubbish lah, spend so much on decoration but food taste like cardboard
reason: Harsh criticism of wedding food. Rude and disrespectful about someone's celebration.
suggested_rewrite: The wedding decor was nice but the food could have been better for the price.

input_text: Malaysian football team is a joke lah, every tournament also first round out, waste taxpayer money
reason: Calls national team a joke. Emotionally charged sports frustration with dismissive personal attack.
suggested_rewrite: The Malaysian football team's performance has been disappointing, hope they can improve with better investment.

input_text: The condo management here is completely hopeless, cannot even fix the lift for 2 weeks already
reason: Calls condo management hopeless. Rude venting about unresolved maintenance issue.
suggested_rewrite: The condo management has been slow to fix the lift, it's been 2 weeks with no progress.

input_text: This aunty at the kopitiam so rude, throw the plate on the table like we're dogs eating
reason: Rude complaint about kopitiam staff with demeaning comparison. Dismissive personal attack.
suggested_rewrite: The staff at the kopitiam was quite rough when serving, could use some improvement in customer service.

input_text: Penang people think their food is the best in the world, so overrated lah actually
reason: Dismissive generalization about Penang people and their food pride. Regional stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Penang food is popular but some people feel it's a bit overhyped.

input_text: The bride's makeup at that wedding damn scary, look like ghost also the MUA dare to charge so much
reason: Harsh mockery of a bride's appearance and her makeup artist. Gossipy and rude personal attack.
suggested_rewrite: The bride's makeup at that wedding didn't turn out well, considering the MUA's pricing.

input_text: Parents in the school group chat so drama, fight over seating arrangement also can become world war
reason: Mocking parents in school chat as dramatic. Dismissive and exaggerated characterization.
suggested_rewrite: The school group chat gets quite heated sometimes, even over minor issues like seating arrangements.

input_text: Ipoh people so slow one, everything also take their own sweet time, no wonder town so dead
reason: Stereotyping Ipoh people as slow and the town as dead. Regional prejudice with dismissive tone.
suggested_rewrite: Ipoh has a more relaxed pace of life compared to bigger cities.

input_text: That referee blind or what, clear foul also cannot see, confirm kena beli already
reason: Insults referee as blind and suggests bribery without evidence. Rude sports commentary with mild rumor.
suggested_rewrite: The referee missed some clear fouls, which raises questions about the officiating quality.

input_text: East Malaysia people come to KL also dunno how to use escalator, so malu
reason: Mocking East Malaysians as unfamiliar with urban infrastructure. Regionally prejudiced and condescending.
suggested_rewrite: People from different regions may take time to adjust to city infrastructure, that's completely normal.

input_text: Aiya this teacher ah, my anak report bully case she just cakap 'biasa la tu', what kind of response is that
reason: Mixed language angry parent complaint about teacher dismissing bullying. Emotionally frustrated.
suggested_rewrite: The teacher dismissed my child's bullying report by saying it's normal, which is concerning.

input_text: Neighbor dari hell la this one, every weekend BBQ sampai asap masuk my house, ask nicely also buat bodoh
reason: Mixed language neighborhood complaint calling neighbor from hell. Rude but about genuine grievance.
suggested_rewrite: My neighbor does BBQ every weekend and the smoke enters my house, even asking nicely doesn't help.

input_text: JB people when come KL, semua benda nak compare with Singapore. Bro you're in Malaysia la, relax
reason: Mixed language stereotyping of JB people as always comparing to Singapore. Dismissive regional commentary.
suggested_rewrite: Some people from JB tend to compare things with Singapore, but each place has its own charm.

input_text: This mamak stall uncle damn rude sia, order roti canai also kena marah, like I disturb his sleep
reason: Mixed language rude restaurant review with personal attack on mamak stall worker.
suggested_rewrite: The mamak stall worker was unfriendly when I ordered, could improve on customer service.

input_text: Bestman speech at the wedding so cringe gila, semua orang malu dengar, poor bride and groom
reason: Mixed language gossipy criticism of someone's wedding speech. Dismissive and mocking.
suggested_rewrite: The best man's speech at the wedding was a bit awkward, but it's the thought that counts.

input_text: Halamak this coach memang bodoh la, tukar player at the wrong time, no wonder kita kalah
reason: Mixed language insult of sports coach as stupid. Emotionally charged sports commentary.
suggested_rewrite: The coach's substitution timing was questionable, it may have contributed to the loss.

input_text: Eh bro don't la act pandai in the comments, you tau apa pasal economics, Google sikit dah rasa professor
reason: Mixed language dismissive online argument. Mocking someone's knowledge as superficial.
suggested_rewrite: It's good to discuss economics but let's make sure we have solid understanding before making claims.

input_text: Parking kat condo ni memang nightmare, selalu kena curi spot pastu management buat tak tahu, useless betul
reason: Mixed language frustrated condo complaint calling management useless. Emotionally charged.
suggested_rewrite: Parking at this condo is a problem, spots get taken and management hasn't addressed it.

input_text: Bride tu over sangat la wei, tukar 5 baju for one night, like she hosting the Oscars ke apa
reason: Mixed language wedding gossip mocking the bride for multiple outfit changes. Dismissive.
suggested_rewrite: The bride had many outfit changes that night, it was quite extravagant.

input_text: Referee tu confirm buta la bro, that was a penalty all day long, rigged match ni
reason: Mixed language sports commentary calling referee blind and suggesting match-fixing. Rude with mild rumor.
suggested_rewrite: The referee missed what seemed like a clear penalty, fans are questioning the decision.

input_text: KL traffic jam lagi teruk from last time, semua orang drive macam siao, no manners langsung
reason: Mixed language complaint about KL traffic with rude generalization about drivers.
suggested_rewrite: KL traffic seems worse than before, drivers could be more considerate on the road.

input_text: 那个部长是白痴吗？这种话也讲得出来，丢脸死了
reason: Calls a minister an idiot for their statements. Rude insult in Chinese Malaysian social media style.
suggested_rewrite: 那个部长的发言不太恰当，作为公众人物应该更谨慎。

input_text: 学校的老师根本不负责任，孩子被欺负了都不管，真是白拿薪水
reason: Accuses teacher of being irresponsible and getting paid for nothing. Angry parent frustration in Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: 学校老师对孩子被欺负的情况处理不够积极，希望学校能重视。

input_text: 隔壁邻居真的很没公德心，半夜唱K吵到我们睡不着，脑子有问题
reason: Insults neighbor as having brain problems for late-night karaoke. Rude venting about noise issue.
suggested_rewrite: 隔壁邻居半夜唱卡拉OK很吵，影响大家休息，希望能注意一下。

input_text: KL人就是这样，看不起外坡人，以为自己很了不起
reason: Chinese Malaysian stereotyping KL people as looking down on outsiders. Regional prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: 有些KL人可能对外地人不太友善，但不应该以偏概全。

input_text: 那间餐厅的服务员态度超差的，好像我们欠他钱一样，以后不会再去了
reason: Rude restaurant review criticizing staff attitude in Chinese. Dismissive personal commentary.
suggested_rewrite: 那间餐厅的服务态度需要改善，希望管理层能注意培训。

input_text: 结婚那天新娘的妆化得跟鬼一样，化妆师还敢收那么贵，坑人
reason: Mocks bride's makeup as ghost-like and accuses MUA of overcharging. Gossipy and rude.
suggested_rewrite: 新娘的妆容不太理想，化妆师的收费与效果不太匹配。

input_text: 马来西亚足球队真的很丢脸，每次比赛都输，教练也不知道在干什么
reason: Calls national football team embarrassing and questions coach competence. Emotionally frustrated sports commentary.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚足球队的表现需要提升，教练的战术也有改进空间。

input_text: 公寓管理层真的很废，报告了那么久电梯还没修好，收管理费干嘛
reason: Calls condo management useless for not fixing the elevator. Rude venting about maintenance failure.
suggested_rewrite: 公寓管理层处理电梯维修太慢了，希望能尽快解决，毕竟居民都在交管理费。

input_text: 网上这些键盘侠真的很烦，什么都不懂还要评论，自以为是专家
reason: Dismisses online commenters as ignorant keyboard warriors. Rude generalization about internet users.
suggested_rewrite: 网上有些评论者缺乏专业知识，建议大家理性讨论。

input_text: 家长群组里那些妈妈真的很烦，整天吵架，鸡毛蒜皮的事也要闹
reason: Calls parents in school group annoying for arguing over trivial matters. Dismissive.
suggested_rewrite: 家长群组里有时候讨论会变得比较激烈，大家可以更冷静地沟通。

input_text: 槟城人觉得他们的食物全世界最好吃，其实也没那么夸张好吗
reason: Dismissive about Penang people's pride in their food. Regional stereotyping in Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: 槟城美食确实有名，但每个人口味不同，各地都有美食。

input_text: Condo的停车场天天有人偷位，管理层吃屎的吗，连这种事也管不好
reason: Vulgar insult toward condo management over parking issues. Emotionally charged with crude language.
suggested_rewrite: Condo停车场经常有人占用他人车位，管理层应该加强管理。

input_text: இந்த அரசாங்கம் என்ன செய்கிறது என்றே தெரியவில்லை, முட்டாள்கள் கூட்டம்
reason: Tamil Malaysian calling government a bunch of fools. Emotionally charged political frustration without threat.
suggested_rewrite: இந்த அரசாங்கம் என்ன செய்கிறது என்பது தெளிவாக இல்லை, மேலும் செயல்திறன் தேவை.

input_text: பள்ளி ஆசிரியர் மிகவும் சோம்பேறி, குழந்தைகளை கவனிக்காமல் போன் பார்த்துக்கொண்டிருக்கிறார்
reason: Calls school teacher lazy for using phone instead of watching children. Rude parent complaint in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: பள்ளி ஆசிரியர் குழந்தைகளுக்கு அதிக கவனம் செலுத்த வேண்டும், போன் பயன்பாட்டை குறைக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: பக்கத்து வீட்டுக்காரன் ஒரு அறிவில்லாதவன், இரவு முழுக்க சத்தம் போடுகிறான்
reason: Calls neighbor senseless for making noise all night. Rude insult driven by noise frustration.
suggested_rewrite: பக்கத்து வீட்டுக்காரர் இரவில் அதிக சத்தம் போடுகிறார், தயவுசெய்து கவனிக்கவும்.

input_text: KL-ல் உள்ளவர்கள் மிகவும் கர்வம், வெளியூர் ஆள் என்றால் மரியாதையே கொடுக்க மாட்டார்கள்
reason: Tamil Malaysian stereotyping KL people as arrogant toward outsiders. Regional prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: KL-ல் சிலர் வெளியூர் மக்களிடம் சற்று அலட்சியமாக இருப்பதாக தோன்றுகிறது.

input_text: அந்த உணவகத்தின் சேவை மிகவும் மோசம், பணியாளர் முகத்தை பார்த்தால் நமக்கு சாப்பிட பிடிக்காது
reason: Rude restaurant review with personal attack on staff's facial expression. Dismissive.
suggested_rewrite: அந்த உணவகத்தின் சேவை மேம்படுத்தப்பட வேண்டும், பணியாளர்கள் நட்பாக இருக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: மலேசிய கால்பந்து அணி ஒரு கேலிக்கூத்து, ஒவ்வொரு முறையும் தோல்வி, வெட்கக்கேடு
reason: Calls national football team a laughingstock. Emotionally frustrated sports commentary in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: மலேசிய கால்பந்து அணியின் செயல்திறன் ஏமாற்றமளிக்கிறது, மேம்பாடு தேவை.

input_text: திருமணத்தில் சமையல் மிகவும் மோசம், அவ்வளவு செலவு செய்தும் சாப்பாடு குப்பை மாதிரி
reason: Calls wedding food garbage. Harsh and rude criticism of someone's wedding catering.
suggested_rewrite: திருமணத்தில் சமையல் எதிர்பார்ப்புக்கு ஏற்ப இல்லை, செலவுக்கு தகுந்த தரம் இல்லை.

input_text: இணையத்தில் கருத்து சொல்பவர்கள் எல்லாம் முட்டாள்கள், எதுவும் தெரியாமல் பேசுகிறார்கள்
reason: Calls online commenters fools. Dismissive generalization about internet users in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: இணையத்தில் கருத்து சொல்வோர் சிலர் போதிய தகவல் இல்லாமல் பேசுகின்றனர்.

input_text: காண்டோ நிர்வாகம் உதவாக்கரை, லிப்ட் பழுது ஒரு மாசமா சரி செய்யவில்லை
reason: Calls condo management useless for not fixing lift. Rude venting in Tamil about maintenance issue.
suggested_rewrite: காண்டோ நிர்வாகம் லிப்ட் பழுதை ஒரு மாதமாக சரி செய்யவில்லை, விரைவில் நடவடிக்கை எடுக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: Dey bro this minister cakap macam dia genius padahal dia yang paling bangang sekali
reason: Mixed Tamil-Malay-English dismissing a minister as most stupid. Rude political commentary.
suggested_rewrite: Minister tu cakap macam pakar tapi keputusannya sering dipersoalkan.

input_text: Mana boleh la parents macam ni, anak buat salah pun defend sampai mati, no wonder la budak tu spoilt
reason: Mixed language criticism of overprotective parents. Rude and judgmental school parent drama.
suggested_rewrite: Some parents defend their children even when they're wrong, which doesn't help the child learn.

input_text: Bodoh punya orang comment section, don't even read the article properly then want to argue
reason: Mixed language insult toward comment section users. Calls them stupid for not reading articles.
suggested_rewrite: Ramai orang di comment section tak baca artikel penuh sebelum berhujah, patut semak dulu.

input_text: Selangor player tu main macam takde semangat, gaji besar performance hampeh, baik letak batu je
reason: Mocks Selangor player's performance as worse than a rock. Rude emotionally charged sports commentary.
suggested_rewrite: Pemain Selangor tu nampak kurang bersemangat, prestasi tidak setimpal dengan gaji.

input_text: Semua politician sama je, masuk kerajaan jadi kaya, keluar kerajaan lagi kaya. Rakyat? Pedulik apa
reason: Accuses all politicians of enriching themselves. Sweeping generalization with unsubstantiated corruption allegation.
suggested_rewrite: Ada persepsi bahawa ramai ahli politik memperkayakan diri semasa berkuasa, ketelusan perlu ditingkatkan.

input_text: Cikgu tu garang gila dengan budak-budak, macam tentera bukan sekolah rendah, kesian anak-anak
reason: Compares strict teacher to military. Emotionally concerned parent with exaggerated rude comparison.
suggested_rewrite: Cikgu tu agak tegas dengan murid-murid, mungkin pendekatan yang lebih lembut sesuai untuk sekolah rendah.

input_text: Orang atas flat ni buang sampah dari tingkap, memang biadab takde didikan
reason: Calls someone uncivilized ('biadab takde didikan') for littering from flat window. Rude insult.
suggested_rewrite: Penghuni atas flat buang sampah dari tingkap, ini sangat tidak bertanggungjawab.

input_text: Boss kantin sekolah ni confirm untung besar, harga naik tapi kualiti macam taik
reason: Accuses school canteen of profiteering with vulgar food comparison. Rude with unsubstantiated profit claim.
suggested_rewrite: Harga makanan kantin sekolah naik tapi kualiti menurun, patut disiasat.

input_text: Orang Perak memang lembab, jalan pun slow macam siput, patutlah negeri tak maju
reason: Stereotyping Perak people as slow and linking it to state development. Regional prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Perak mempunyai rentak kehidupan yang berbeza, bukan bermakna kurang maju.

input_text: Goalkeeper team tu memang ayam, bola senang pun tak boleh tangkap, baik letak tiang je
reason: Mocks goalkeeper as worse than a post. Rude sports trash talk.
suggested_rewrite: Goalkeeper team tu buat beberapa kesilapan yang sepatutnya boleh dielakkan.

input_text: So annoying lah the uncle next door, every morning 6am start his car engine warm up for 30 minutes like he driving F1
reason: Mocking neighbor with F1 comparison for warming car engine. Rude exaggeration over noise issue.
suggested_rewrite: The neighbor starts warming his car engine at 6am for 30 minutes every morning, which is quite disruptive.

input_text: Don't know what the coach is thinking lah, play the same losing strategy every match, Einstein also cannot help this team
reason: Sarcastic mockery of coach's strategy. Dismissive sports commentary with exaggerated comparison.
suggested_rewrite: The coach keeps using the same strategy that hasn't been working, a change in approach might help.

input_text: The parents in WhatsApp group fight over whose kid should be class monitor, so childish lah these adults
reason: Calls parents childish for school group arguments. Dismissive characterization of adults.
suggested_rewrite: Some parents in the WhatsApp group get quite competitive over class monitor positions.

input_text: Eh this new restaurant at Mid Valley food so bad, chef must have graduated from YouTube University
reason: Mocks chef's skills with YouTube University comparison. Sarcastic and rude restaurant review.
suggested_rewrite: The new restaurant at Mid Valley was disappointing, the food quality doesn't match expectations.

input_text: That aunty at the AGM talk so much nonsense, waste everyone's time, nobody asked for her life story
reason: Dismissive and rude about a woman at a condo AGM. Personal attack on her contributions.
suggested_rewrite: One resident at the AGM spoke at length about topics not on the agenda, which extended the meeting.

input_text: Perak dah la boring, orang dia pun boring, pergi sana rasa macam time stop
reason: Stereotyping Perak and its people as boring. Rude regional generalization.
suggested_rewrite: Perak mempunyai suasana yang lebih tenang, mungkin kurang sesuai untuk yang suka kehidupan pantas.

input_text: Anak orang tu sekolah biasa je tapi mak bapak berlagak macam anak genius, delusional gila
reason: Gossipy attack on parents for being proud of their child. Rude and dismissive personal commentary.
suggested_rewrite: Ada ibu bapa yang mungkin terlalu memuji pencapaian anak, tapi setiap ibu bapa memang sayangkan anak.

input_text: Kalau nak tengok wayang free, pergi je sidang parlimen. Lagi best dari Netflix
reason: Sarcastic meme-style comparison of parliament to Netflix. Dismissive of democratic institution.
suggested_rewrite: Sidang parlimen kadang-kadang penuh drama, harap wakil rakyat lebih fokus pada isu penting.

input_text: 那个议员讲话像放屁一样，说了等于没说，浪费大家时间
reason: Vulgar comparison of politician's speech to flatulence. Crude political frustration in Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: 那个议员的发言缺乏实质内容，浪费了大家的时间。

input_text: 邻居养的猫天天来我家大便，跟主人讲了也不理，真是没素质
reason: Calls neighbor lacking in quality over cat issue. Rude venting about pet dispute.
suggested_rewrite: 邻居的猫经常到我家院子，跟主人沟通了但没有改善，希望能解决。

input_text: Dah la cukai naik, gaji tak naik, lepas tu menteri cakap rakyat kena jimat. Jimat apa bang, kau yang boros
reason: Sarcastically confronts minister about asking people to save while taxes increase. Rude but valid frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Cukai naik tapi gaji tidak, nasihat menteri agar rakyat berjimat terasa kurang sensitif.

input_text: Kawan aku punya wedding photographer memang scam, gambar semua gelap macam ambik guna Nokia 3310
reason: Accuses wedding photographer of being a scam with mocking Nokia comparison. Rude with mild defamation.
suggested_rewrite: Kawan saya kurang puas hati dengan gambar perkahwinan, kualitinya tidak setimpal dengan harga.

input_text: Seriously the school bus driver drives like he wants to kill everyone, so reckless, parents should complain
reason: Exaggerated accusation of school bus driver. Emotionally charged parent concern expressed rudely.
suggested_rewrite: The school bus driver seems to drive recklessly, parents should raise this safety concern with the school.

input_text: Mak-mak dalam group ni suka sangat flexing anak masuk tuition mahal, padahal result biasa je
reason: Gossipy mockery of parents showing off expensive tuition. Dismissive and judgmental.
suggested_rewrite: Ada ibu bapa yang suka kongsi tentang tuition anak, tapi keputusan bergantung pada banyak faktor.

input_text: Guard condo ni memang lahanat, visitor nak masuk susah sangat tapi delivery rider masuk sesuka hati
reason: Calls condo security guard with harsh word ('lahanat'). Emotionally frustrated over inconsistent rules.
suggested_rewrite: Pengawal keselamatan condo kurang konsisten, pelawat susah masuk tapi penghantar makanan senang je.

input_text: This hawker stall uncle always shortchange me, eyes also cannot see properly ke the coins
reason: Rude accusation of hawker shortchanging with mocking reference to eyesight. Dismissive personal attack.
suggested_rewrite: I've noticed incorrect change a few times at this hawker stall, might be worth mentioning politely.

input_text: Eh the groom's family so kedekut, wedding dinner only 6 course, somemore got empty table everywhere
reason: Mixed language wedding gossip calling groom's family stingy. Rude criticism of wedding event.
suggested_rewrite: The wedding dinner was a bit modest with only 6 courses and some empty tables.

input_text: Polis trafik kat simpang tu memang tidur standing up, kereta jam panjang dia buat bodoh je
reason: Mocks traffic police as sleeping while standing. Rude dismissal of enforcement officers.
suggested_rewrite: Polis trafik di simpang tu nampak kurang aktif mengawal trafik yang sesak.

input_text: 那些家长会里的妈妈们，整天在群组里炫耀自己孩子多厉害，烦死了
reason: Calls parents annoying for showing off children's achievements in group chats. Dismissive.
suggested_rewrite: 家长群组里有些家长喜欢分享孩子的成就，有时候会让人觉得有点多。

input_text: இந்த அரசியல்வாதிகள் எல்லாம் ஒரே மாதிரி, வாயால் வீர்ர் செயலில் சுழியம்
reason: Dismisses all politicians as all talk no action. Tamil political frustration with sweeping generalization.
suggested_rewrite: பல அரசியல்வாதிகள் செயலை விட வார்த்தைகளில் அதிகம் கவனம் செலுத்துவதாக தோன்றுகிறது.
